overall.description: A first-person exploration through a foggy forest environment in a video game. The player walks along a wooden lakeside walkway, encounters giant moss-covered crabs on a hillside, and observes them before continuing along the trail.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden rope bridge pathway beside a misty lake

thick rope handrails attached to wooden posts on the left side
thick rope handrails attached to wooden posts on the right side
steep grassy slope covered in green moss and ferns
calm greenish water shrouded in fog with tree reflections
massive tree trunk with sprawling branches blocking the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow wooden walkway suspended between a mossy hillside and a misty lake. Thick rope railings line both sides of the weathered planks. Fog obscures the distant shore, and a large ancient tree looms ahead at the end of the path.

events.description: camera turns left away from the wooden walkway toward the hillside
giant moss-covered crabs come into view on the hillside

agents.ego_description: turning toward the hillside to observe large crab-like creatures

notable_agents.action: giant moss-covered crab with large pink claws resting on the hillside

entered.detail: dirt and grass ground covered in fallen leaves

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the walkway toward the mossy hillside, revealing giant crustaceans camouflaged with moss and lichen. The wooden walkway falls out of view as the focus shifts to the forest floor and the massive crabs resting on the slope.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the giant moss-covered crab, circling around it to observe its details including the pink fleshy mouth and segmented legs. The creature remains mostly stationary with slight movements, while the camera captures it from various angles against the forest floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside forest trail with wooden posts

foggy opposite bank of the lake with trees

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the giant crabs and continues along the trail, with wooden posts appearing on the right side. The misty lake comes back into view on the right, revealing the distant foggy shoreline ahead as the path continues through the dense forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins on a lakeside path and diverts into a forest encounter with giant creatures before returning to the trail. It begins with a walk along a narrow wooden walkway with rope railings, suspended between a mossy hillside and a misty lake that obscures the distant shore. As the camera turns left away from the planks, the scene shifts toward the hillside to reveal massive crustaceans camouflaged with moss and lichen resting on the forest floor. The camera then circles these stationary creatures to observe their segmented legs and pink fleshy mouths before moving past them and back toward the path. Finally, the view opens up as wooden posts reappear on the right and the misty lake returns to sight, leading the way toward the foggy shoreline through the dense forest.
